response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong JS/TypeScript and DLang background, but the role demands deep JVM expertise with Java, Kotlin, and the Spring ecosystem. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms work at Altom) and Kotlin/Spring are absent entirely. The closest IDE-relevant experience is C/C++ work on LabWindows/CVI a decade ago, which does not transfer to modern JVM language tooling. Mismatch is significant on the core required qualifications.
strengths: Prior IDE work on LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments shows exposure to developer-tool internals
Long track record on complex, large-scale systems (Sociomantic micro-services handling millions of req/s)
Strong software craftsmanship habits — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and only minimal, dated Java exposure
No Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise JVM framework experience listed
Recent focus is TypeScript/Node and AI tooling, not JVM language tooling or build systems

key_factors.factor: Proven work on complex large-scale codebases
